projects.title: SiPerintis (Technical Approval System)
base_bullets: Developed a Laravel & MySQL-based technical approval system (SiPerintis) for the Purwakarta District Environmental Agency.
Integrated regional APIs and Google reCAPTCHA to improve system security.

projects.title: Purwakartakab Frontend Portal
base_bullets: Developed the Purwakartakab frontend portal using SvelteKit & TypeScript.
Implemented API integration and OpenLayers-based spatial data visualization.

projects.title: Company Internal ERP System
base_bullets: Developed the company's internal ERP system to support business processes.
Built using SvelteKit, Drizzle ORM, MySQL, and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: One Map Information System
base_bullets: Building a One Map Information System for Purwakarta Regency based on Laravel and OpenLayers.
Focused on the management and visualization of geographic data.

projects.title: Supplyra ERP
base_bullets: Designed and developed a modular web-based ERP system for integrated business management, covering project management, finance, HR, and reporting modules.
Implemented backend services using Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Drizzle ORM with Redis caching and BullMQ for background job processing.
Developed role-based access control (RBAC), audit logging, and activity tracking for enterprise-level system security.

projects.title: CloudLab Environment
base_bullets: Built on-premises cloud environments using Docker, Nginx, Prometheus, and Grafana for production system simulations.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions for build and deployment automation.
Simulated deployment production using Kubernetes.

projects.title: Tikdrop
base_bullets: Developed a high-performance Progressive Web Application (PWA) using Next.js 16.
Designed a modular system architecture with Firebase for user data synchronization and Zustand for state management.
Built a responsive web application with multilingual support (i18n) and accessibility compliance (WCAG principles).

projects.title: Geovara
base_bullets: Developed a stateless geospatial engineering web-based platform for professional GeoJSON processing and editing.
Optimized rendering performance using Web Workers to handle large GeoJSON datasets responsively (60fps).
Built a spatial intelligence layer using Turf.js for real-time geometry analysis.
